cases.title: Vendor control override and unsupported spend
cases.verdict_reason: Evidence and controls support the finding; refuters searched.
cases.narrative: A newly created vendor was approved without independent review and paid with no supporting delivery evidence.

evidence_chain.step: Vendor master created and self-approved by the same user (MV-U05)
User MV-U05 holds create-vendor, post, and payment rights
Invoices and payments booked against the vendor

calculation.sql: SELECT SUM(ABS(amount)) FROM t WHERE account = ? AND amount < 0 AND lower(text) NOT LIKE '%saldenvortrag%'

counter_tests.name: independent_approval
counter_tests.detail: Creator and approver are the same user; no independent approval.

counter_tests.name: goods_receipt
counter_tests.detail: Vendor does not appear in any goods-receipt list.

counter_tests.name: prior_year_history
counter_tests.detail: No opening balance or prior-period activity for the vendor.

cases.uncertainty: Service invoices do not always carry goods receipts; absence alone is not proof and must be weighed with the other evidence.
cases.recommended_action: Obtain the framework contract, independent approval, and service/receipt evidence before sign-off.

cases.title: Vendor control override and unsupported spend
cases.narrative: A newly created vendor; segregation of duties is being verified.

evidence_chain.step: Vendor master created (MV-U03) and approved (MV-U02)
Invoices and payments booked against the vendor

calculation.sql: SELECT SUM(ABS(amount)) FROM t WHERE account = ? AND amount < 0 AND lower(text) NOT LIKE '%saldenvortrag%'

counter_tests.name: independent_approval
counter_tests.detail: Creator and approver differ (four-eyes principle operated).

counter_tests.name: prior_year_history
counter_tests.detail: No opening balance or prior-period activity for the vendor.

cases.uncertainty: Service invoices do not always carry goods receipts; absence alone is not proof and must be weighed with the other evidence.
cases.recommended_action: Obtain the framework contract, independent approval, and service/receipt evidence before sign-off.

cases.title: Approval-limit payment splitting
cases.verdict_reason: Evidence and controls support the finding; refuters searched.
cases.narrative: 4 payments on 14.10.2025 share one reference and each fall below the 10000 EUR approval limit, but aggregate to 39040.00.

evidence_chain.step: Second-approval threshold is 10000 EUR (policy document)

evidence.raw_value: 3. Interne Kontrollen. Zahlungsfreigaben ab 10.000 EUR erfordern eine zweite Freigabe (Vier-Augen-Prinzip). Kreditoren-Neuanlagen und Bankdatenänderungen sind genehmigungspflichtig (Stammdatenänderungen_2025.csv). Funktionstrennung zwischen Kreditoren-Stammdaten, Buchung und Zahlungslauf ist vorgesehen (Berechtigungsauswertung_2025.xlsx).

evidence_chain.step: 4 same-day payments share reference SAMMEL-200007

calculation.sql: SELECT reference, day, COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(amount) AS total, MAX(amount) AS biggest FROM t GROUP BY reference, day HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 AND SUM(amount) >= ? AND MAX(amount) < ?

counter_tests.name: separate_invoices
counter_tests.detail: Whether the legs settle distinct underlying invoices/documents.

counter_tests.name: instalment_plan
counter_tests.detail: Searched payment texts for an instalment agreement.

counter_tests.name: second_approval
counter_tests.detail: No second approval recorded above the threshold.

cases.recommended_action: Review the approval-limit control and confirm whether the payments should have required a second approval.

cases.title: Repairs capitalised as fixed assets
cases.verdict_reason: Evidence and controls support the finding; refuters searched.
cases.narrative: 6 additions with repair/maintenance descriptions were posted to balance-sheet asset accounts rather than maintenance expense, overstating assets and profit.

evidence_chain.step: Repair-type addition: Reparatur Konfektioniermaschine Linie 2
Repair-type addition: Austausch Hydraulikaggregat Presse 3
Repair-type addition: Instandsetzung Förderband Halle II
Repair-type addition: Generalüberholung Stanzautomat
Repair-type addition: Reparatur Kälteanlage Lager
Repair-type addition: Austausch Antriebssteuerung Palettierer

counter_tests.name: investment_request
counter_tests.detail: Searched documents for an investment request for these assets.

counter_tests.name: capacity_or_useful_life
counter_tests.detail: Descriptions indicate restoration, not capacity increase or useful-life extension.

counter_tests.name: separable_new_asset
counter_tests.detail: Descriptions reference existing equipment, not a distinct new asset.

cases.recommended_action: Reclassify repair costs to maintenance expense and correct asset values.

cases.title: Prior-period costs booked in the subsequent period
cases.verdict_reason: Evidence and controls support the finding; refuters searched.
cases.narrative: 8 invoices dated after 2025-12-31 relate to services delivered before the balance-sheet date, with no transaction-level accrual recorded, overstating profit.

evidence_chain.step: Balance-sheet date is 2025-12-31

counter_tests.name: matched_accrual
counter_tests.detail: Searched the ledger for a transaction-level accrual matching these invoices before the balance-sheet date.

counter_tests.name: returned_or_cancelled
counter_tests.detail: No return, cancellation, or dispute found for these services.

cases.uncertainty: A general accrual may exist; only a per-invoice match may clear these, so partial coverage requires manual reconciliation.
cases.recommended_action: Recognise the unrecorded liabilities in the period under audit or evidence a matching accrual per invoice.
